# Guard

- **Ability Scores::** Strength, Intelligence, Wisdom
- **Feat::** [[alert]]
- **Skill Proficiencies::** [[athletics]], [[perception]]
- **Tool Proficiency::** Choose one kind of [[gaming_set Set]]
- **Equipment::** Choose A or B: (A) [[spear]], [[light_crossbow Crossbow]], 20 [[bolt]], [[gaming_set Set]] (same as above), [[hooded_lantern Lantern]], [[manacles]], [[quiver]], [[traveler_s_clothes's Clothes]], 12 GP; or (B) 50 GP
